solution_reveal: The Aksumite heritage laid the foundation for modern Ethiopian identity.

tiles.fragment: Standard Tigrigna greeting meaning 'Are you well?'.
Short for 'How are you?' in Tigrigna.
Shared word for Peace across Semitic languages.
The massive stone stelae marking royal tombs.
The King who converted Aksum to Christianity.
Aksum was the first sub-Saharan state to mint currency.
The ancient script used as the basis for modern Ethiopian alphabets.
Sourdough flatbread made from Teff grain.
The iconic Ethiopian spicy chicken stew.
Minced raw beef seasoned with mitmita and niter kibbeh.
Coffee, which originated in the Kaffa region.
